title: Workflow — design monitoring for new order processing service
code_snippet:
# Goal: set up monitoring for new order processing service
# Service: REST API, handles 500 orders/sec peak
# Dependencies: PostgreSQL, Redis cache, Kafka consumer
# Team: 5 engineers, on-call rotation, PagerDuty
# Current monitoring: none
expected_feedback: Workflow: greenfield monitoring design for order processing. (1) SLIs: availability (non-5xx ratio), p99 latency, Kafka consumer lag, error rate. (2) SLOs: 99.9% availability, p99 < 500ms, consumer lag < 5000. (3) Alerts: burn-rate for availability SLO (14.4x critical, 6x warning), consumer lag > 10K (warning), DB connection pool > 80% (warning). (4) Routing: critical → PagerDuty with 15-min escalation, warning → #order-alerts Slack. (5) Dashboards: L1 overview (4 golden signals), L2 service detail (RED by endpoint), L3 dependencies (DB, Redis, Kafka). (6) Runbooks: one per alert. (7) Alert fatigue target: <5 pages/week.
